mapper.update:
update t_etc set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where etc_id in
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT oc.*, oe.enterprise_name, e.actual_name createUserName, v.vehicle_number useVehicleNumber FROM t_etc oc LEFT JOIN t_oa_enterprise oe ON oe.enterprise_id = oc.enterprise_id LEFT JOIN t_employee e ON e.employee_id = oc.create_user_id LEFT JOIN t_vehicle v ON v.vehicle_id = oc.use_vehicle_id WHERE etc_id = #{etcId}

select * from t_etc where enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} and etc_no in
#{item}
select * from t_etc where enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} and etc_no = #{etcNo}
